description: A manager wants to enroll their employee in an upcoming 'Leadership Skills' training course.

nodes.task_description: Identify the employee and the desired training course in the Learning Management System (LMS).

expected_outcome.expected: L&D specialist identifies the employee and the course.

nodes.task_description: Check for available seats in the upcoming course session.

expected_outcome.expected: Specialist confirms there are open seats.

nodes.task_description: Enroll the employee in the course and send a confirmation to the employee and their manager.

expected_outcome.expected: Specialist successfully enrolls the employee and sends notifications.
